texto: I wanted intimacy in caps lock but I got it in parentheses. We curled into each other, upside down, my empty spaces filled by another. "Give me the three minute version of your life story," he said. I nailed it it one then refused to throw the question back as etiquette governs. He wanted to know where I'd been. I wanted to know who he was.
explicacao: Citação de Eleni Zoe sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “I wanted intimacy in caps lock but I got it in parentheses. We curled into each other, upside dow…” articula reflexao, relationships, wanted em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
